title: Cubicles
excerpt: An inspectable, tool-driven agent workbench with a Python CLI core, persistent sessions, traceable memory, explicit tool use, and support for local and OpenAI-compatible model providers.

title: LLM Agent Workflow Generator
excerpt: A minimal agentic LLM web app built with Next.js 15 (App Router), featuring a chat interface and a visual workflow editor for AI agent flows.

title: SimpleLM: Lightweight Transformer Language Model with RLHF (PPO)
excerpt: SimpleLM is a minimal, CPU-friendly language model based on a Transformer decoder architecture. It supports both supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with prompt/response pairs and PPO-based RL training with a neural reward model (RLHF-style) for human/AI feedback (RLHF) using PPO. The project is designed for educational purposes and easy experimentation on small hardware.

title: DayRider
excerpt: Simplify your weekly work with a minimal todo task management app.

title: An End-to-end Image Dehazing System with Light-weighted CNN And Dark Channel Prior
excerpt: Instructor: Joseph Konan Team: Jingsi Chen,Junxiao Guo, Shuhao Ren ,Luo Yu (ordered by last name initials)

title: Swarm
excerpt: A comprehensive CLI-based agent for web browsing, automation, and deep research with LLM integration.
